articles.title: Support Marathon to Save Bungie, Says Ex-Manager
articles.description: Bungie's former community manager insists player counts shouldn't be compared between Destiny 2 and Marathon. He claims Bungie's issues predate Marathon's arrival.
articles.impact: Bungie's future hinges on player support for Marathon.

articles.title: Poll Reveals Mixed Feelings on Street Fighter 6 Season 4
articles.description: Street Fighter 6's Season 4 plans were unveiled, surprising many fans. Community feedback is being gathered on the new direction and character additions.
articles.impact: Community feedback will shape future updates.

articles.title: Zelda: Ocarina of Time Remake Tops Summer Game Fest
articles.description: The remake of Zelda: Ocarina of Time was among the most popular titles at Summer Game Fest 2026. Fans are excited about its upcoming release.
key_points: Top title at Summer Game Fest
articles.impact: The remake boosts anticipation for Nintendo's lineup.

articles.title: AMD Denies Bug Bounty After Security Flaw Fix
articles.description: AMD failed to pay a $10,000 bounty for a critical security flaw in its auto-updater, which took 124 days to fix. This has raised concerns about their security practices.
articles.impact: AMD's actions may damage its reputation.

articles.title: Waze Expands Traffic Lights Feature to More Users
articles.description: Waze continues to roll out its traffic lights feature, enhancing navigation for users. This feature was first tested last December.
articles.impact: Waze enhances user experience with new features.

articles.title: Record Discounts on AirPods and Switch 2 Sales
articles.description: AirPods models see record low prices this week, including AirPods Pro 3 and Max 2. A rare discount on Switch 2 is also available.
articles.impact: Consumers benefit from significant tech discounts.

articles.title: Final Fantasy 7 Director Calls Streamers a Crisis
articles.description: The director of Final Fantasy 7 expresses concern that watching streamers may deter players from engaging with RPGs. He emphasizes the need for more player choice.
articles.impact: The industry must adapt to streaming trends.

articles.title: Crimson Desert Developer Discusses Game Changes
articles.description: Crimson Desert's developer shares insights on story changes and the meaning of 'DLC'. The game has sold over 6 million copies since launch.
articles.impact: Crimson Desert's success may influence future games.

articles.title: Nintendo's Legal Battle Over Palworld Nears End
articles.description: Nintendo's attempt to block Palworld is likely to yield minimal results, with a potential payout of only $30,000. The case appears to be wrapping up.
articles.impact: Nintendo's legal strategy faces significant setbacks.

articles.title: New Surveillance Tech Enhances Tracking Capabilities
articles.description: New surveillance technology allows tracking beyond license plates using smartphone data and RFID chips. This raises privacy concerns.
key_points: New tech tracks beyond license plates
articles.impact: Increased surveillance may threaten personal privacy.

articles.title: Xenoblade Chronicles Graphics Comparison Across Platforms
articles.description: A new video compares Xenoblade Chronicles graphics on Wii, 3DS, Switch, and Switch 2. Fans can see the visual improvements across systems.

articles.title: Gran Turismo 7 Launches New Weekly Challenges
articles.description: Gran Turismo 7 introduces new weekly challenges starting June 12. Players can participate in five events and earn rewards.

articles.title: Early Prime Day Apple Deals Offer Major Discounts
articles.description: Ahead of Prime Day, Apple products are seeing discounts up to $300. Retailers are offering some of the lowest prices on new releases.
articles.impact: Consumers can save significantly on Apple products.
